reasoning: The control AC-17(10) focuses on ensuring secure remote access and authentication of remote commands. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that the API server is securely configured to authenticate and authorize requests, which is handled by enabling authentication and RBAC authorization. Additionally, NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict network access to the cluster, ensuring that only authorized ingress and egress traffic is allowed.
title: Remote Access - Remote access | authenticate remote commands implement [ assignment
